title: linaria kurdica subsp. aucheri
intro: Linaria kurdica subsp. aucheri is a plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as the toadflax or snapdragon. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Linaria kurdica subsp. aucheri include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
